jobs.title: Associate Creative Director, Ring Retail & Marketing
jobs.why: Ring is Amazon's design-led smart home hardware brand — exactly the consumer-tech brand environment where Garman's brand-system thinking, retail creative leadership, and AI production pipeline provides real leverage. ACD title is a direct match. Lead with Nissan North American Brand System, Toyota AI Pipeline, and Toyota/Lexus Owners CRM. Main risk: posting is ~3.5 months old — verify it's still active before investing time in a cover letter.

jobs.title: Creative Director (onsite in Sherman Oaks)
jobs.why: Fresh posting, CD-level title match, LA-based. However, $150K cap is minimal upside from current, and beauty/cosmetics is a new vertical with no portfolio overlap. Worth applying only if JD shows brand systems scope beyond product photography.

jobs.title: Associate Creative Director, Art
jobs.why: ACD Art title match at an agency with decent pay range. The major friction is NJ location — relocation from LA is a significant ask. Worth a conversation if remote or hybrid is on the table.

jobs.title: Director of External Relations and Communications
jobs.why: Nonprofit external comms/PR director — fundamentally different discipline from creative direction. Despite the LA location and broad pay range, this is not a fit.

jobs.title: Sr. Manager, Material Development
jobs.why: Apparel material development — completely unrelated to design or creative direction. Below comp target and wrong discipline.

jobs.title: Director, Channel Strategies
jobs.why: Financial services collections company strategy role in Iowa at well below comp target. Not relevant.

jobs.title: Associate Graphic Designer
jobs.why: Entry/junior level graphic design role — far below Garman's ACD/CD seniority. Not applicable.

jobs.title: Director of Marketing
jobs.why: Industrial B2B marketing director in Ohio — outside creative discipline, wrong geography, and below comp target. Not a fit.
